introSection: Skutan (Swedish for small boat) is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Preston & Barbieri currently located at DaftöLand in Strömstad, Västra Götaland, Sweden.
fullText: Skutan (Swedish for small boat) is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Preston & Barbieri currently located at DaftöLand in Strömstad, Västra Götaland, Sweden.
